Destinations

Study Destinations

World-leading universities across 6 premier destinations designed for your success.

🇺🇸

USA

Top-ranked universities with world-class education

→Harvard, MIT, Stanford
→OPT Work Opportunity
→Best in STEM
🇬🇧

United Kingdom

Historic institutions with global recognition

→Oxford, Cambridge, LSE
→2-Year Programs
→EU Access
🇩🇪

Germany

Affordable education with excellent quality

→Low/Free Tuition
→Engineering Focus
→Post-Study Work
🇦🇺

Australia

Modern campuses in multicultural environment

→Beautiful Campus Life
→3-Year Work Visa
→Best MBBS
🇳🇿

New Zealand

Quality education in serene environment

→Supportive Community
→3-Year Work Visa
→Safe & Friendly
🇦🇪

Dubai

Gateway to Middle East with premium education

→Tax-Free Income
→Global Hub
→Luxury Lifestyle

Programs

Study Programs

From medicine to PhDs, expert guidance through every step of your academic journey.

🏥

MBBS

DURATION

5-6 Years

ELIGIBILITY

12th Biology + Physics + Chemistry

✓WHO recognized universities
✓Hospital internships included
✓Return to India options
⚙️

Engineering

DURATION

4 Years

ELIGIBILITY

12th Physics + Mathematics + Chemistry

✓Top-tier tech institutes
✓Internship opportunities
✓Post-study work visa
💼

MBA

DURATION

1-2 Years

ELIGIBILITY

Bachelor's degree + Work experience

✓Global business network
✓Career advancement
✓Executive placements
🎓

PhD

DURATION

3-4 Years

ELIGIBILITY

Master's degree in relevant field

✓Full scholarship options
✓Research opportunities
✓Faculty mentoring

"Eurotechedu Pro made my dream of studying in the UK a reality. Their guidance during the application and visa process was absolutely invaluable!"

"The application process for Germany was complex, but the team here made it seamless. I couldn't have secured my spot without them."

Sorbonne University, France

"Highly professional team. They helped me with every detail from visa interviews to finding student housing in Paris. Exceptional service!"

Excellent coaching for my entrance exams. The prep materials were very clear and tailored to European standards.
